title: Forms of testaments
doc_html:
SECTION 2.  FORMS OF TESTAMENTS

Art. 1574.  Forms of testaments

There are two forms of testaments: olographic and notarial.

Acts 1997, No. 1421, §1, eff. July 1, 1999.
